testcase.name: tests.test_challenge_api
testcase.error: tests/test_challenge_api.py:8: in <module> class TestChallengeAPI(unittest.TestCase): tests/test_challenge_api.py:11: in TestChallengeAPI api = maproulette.Challenge(config) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/challenge.py:11: in __init__ super().__init__(configuration=config) maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:19: in __init__ if self.__check_health(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ maproulette/api/maproulette_server.py:41: in __check_health raise ConnectionUnavailableError( E maproulette.api.errors.ConnectionUnavailableError: {'message': 'Specified server unavailable'}
